title: software.package Facet
description: Demanded by the patch/advisory check (ADR-0080) and the OS-package collector: the installed-software inventory on a host — the PACKAGE form of the cross-cutting deliverable-software dimension. Software is a DIMENSION, not a taxonomy: `deliveryForm` (package|container|chart|binary|script) and `origin` (distro|internal|external|vendor) are OPEN strings (§1.4), so a binary, a container, and an apt package are the same dimension in different forms — never separate Entity kinds. A projection of the host's actual state (§1.2), observed by a collector; never authored in the graph. The patch/advisory check reads it to raise vulnerable/EOL Findings. A Facet exists only when a shipping Contract demands it (§1.1); validated at the Projector write path.

packages.description: The installed packages observed on this host.

origin.description: Development lineage — OPEN: distro | internal | external | vendor.

deliveryForm.description: OPEN form of the deliverable-software dimension; this facet is the `package` form.
